baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TATB>5<TAB>3<TAB>Overall quality lacks immediate relevance due to lack of contextual connection, but maintains persona and natural tone well.

The response is relevant to the context, consistent with the persona of a strict and fair Gatekeeper who would not easily grant access without proper justification. The language used feels natural for an old royal guard but could be slightly more direct in tone given the urgency implied by "Please."
